rules: NO Inter for headings. Keep the typography technical but high-end.
Use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines and small labels.
MANDATORY: Use IBM Plex Mono for all telemetry data (speed, IMEI, coordinates, time).

visual_enhancers.bento_grid: Use high-density grid for telemetry details. grid-cols-2 or grid-cols-3 with gap-0.5 and bg-white/10 to act as 1px borders between cells.
visual_enhancers.markers: Custom HTML map markers (divIcons) with CSS pulse rings for active/moving vehicles. Glow effect using drop-shadow.
visual_enhancers.active_state: Selected vehicle in the list MUST have a subtle 1px left border glowing with the status color (e.g. border-l-emerald-500) and a very subtle linear-gradient background.

layouts.main: Full screen map (absolute inset-0 z-0). UI layers float on top of the map. DO NOT put the map inside a flex row.
layouts.sidebar: w-[400px] flex flex-col h-auto max-h-[calc(100vh-2rem)] absolute left-4 top-4 bottom-4 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden z-10
layouts.detail_panel: w-[400px] flex flex-col h-auto max-h-[calc(100vh-2rem)] absolute right-4 top-4 bottom-4 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden z-10
layouts.mobile: Map background, floating search top. Details and list act as an expandable bottom sheet (rounded-t-3xl, fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0).

components.vehicle_card: Minimalist row, group hover. Left: Status indicator dot. Center: Vehicle Name (font-semibold text-white) + Plate (font-mono text-xs text-zinc-400). Right: Speed (font-mono text-emerald-400). Padding: p-4.
components.telemetry_widget: Technical look. Container: flex flex-col p-4 bg-zinc-900/50. Top: Subdued label (tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-[10px] text-zinc-500). Bottom: Large value (text-2xl font-mono text-white).
components.filters: Pill-shaped toggle buttons, backdrop-blur, subtle active states (bg-white/10 text-white border-white/20).
components.add_device_modal: High-end form. Glassmorphic overlay. Form inputs MUST have solid dark background (bg-zinc-900) to contrast the glass modal, with focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-white/50.

motion.hover: Subtle translate-x-1 on list items, bg-white/5.
motion.markers: Active vehicles get a pulsing ring animation: animate-ping absolute inset-0 rounded-full opacity-50.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over glass meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow if necessary over the map.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the font import URL into the index.css or main App file.
Apply fonts in tailwind.config.js: sans: ['IBM Plex Sans'], mono: ['IBM Plex Mono'], heading: ['Manrope'].
Use react-leaflet with cartodb dark_matter tiles: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png'.
The page is entirely dark mode. Enforce dark mode classes everywhere (e.g. text-white, bg-zinc-950).
Implement the left sidebar and right panel as floating elements OVER the map (z-10), not adjacent to it. They must use the glassmorphism definition.
Do NOT use generic shadcn Card components for the main sidebars. Use raw semantic HTML (`aside`, `section`) with glassmorphism classes.

Data structure in the Detail Panel MUST use a Bento grid (grid-cols-2). Example: `<div class='grid grid-cols-2 gap-[1px] bg-white/10 border-y border-white/10'>` with cells having `bg-zinc-950/80` to create hair-line borders between stats.

Map Markers MUST be custom HTML DivIcons (Leaflet feature) to show status colors. Example HTML: `
`.
Do not use the default Leaflet blue pins.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that feel premium.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients. Use solid darks with noise/grain or subtle glass effects.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions to specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use Lucide React.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, selection states.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
